prestazioni: Installation of a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger kit (engine code: 8C-R2, 1.6L twin-rotor rotary with direct injection) with a custom intercooler setup by HKS, including a front-mount Spearco core and custom billet aluminum piping to handle 12 psi of boost, targeting 450 HP at 8,500 RPM while maintaining OEM reliability

Full titanium exhaust system by Racing Beat, featuring 3.5-inch diameter piping with a 4-2-1 merge collector, paired with a custom Borla Pro XS muffler to optimize backpressure for the 8C-R2’s unique scavenging needs, reducing weight by 22 lbs over OEM

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Mazda-specific valving) with 8-way adjustable damping, custom spring rates (8K front, 9K rear), and adjustable top mounts by Cusco, paired with a full polybush kit from Whiteline (part #KDT998) to eliminate compliance in the ND-based chassis
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Mazda Iconic SP-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front splitter, and a duckbill rear wing, all finished in Mazda’s signature Soul Red Crystal with a matte clear coat for UV resistance

Custom carbon fiber engine cover by Seibon, featuring a clear-coated weave with the 8C-R2 engine code laser-etched into the surface, paired with a carbon fiber air intake system by AEM (part #21-821C) for a functional yet aggressive engine bay aesthetic

Rear diffuser by Varis Japan, designed to work with the Iconic SP’s underbody aero, featuring integrated carbon fiber strakes and a titanium exhaust outlet surround, finished in raw carbon fiber with a satin clear coat
